name: California Management Review

length.note: Inquire with the editor before submitting materially longer or shorter.

abstract.note: A 100-word summary of the basic argument.

citation_style: Chicago Manual of Style, numbered notes (endnote format), not scientific/author-date.

etal_rule.note: First author + 'et al.' for 3+ authors, in both full and shortened notes.

figures_tables.note: Tables/figures uploaded as separate files, each on its own page, with insertion references in the text.

cover_letter.note: Not specified by the guidelines; a one-page letter is customary.

ai_disclosure.note: CMR page does not restate an AI policy; SAGE has a publisher-wide generative-AI/authorship policy. Disclose on the (non-blind) title page.

distinctive_rules: No separate reference list: all bibliographic detail lives inside numbered endnotes.
Practitioner-oriented; define jargon and acronyms; avoid scientific notation.
Up to three descending heading levels, used consistently.
PDFs are not accepted; submit Word.
No simultaneous submissions; no submission fee.
